query:
SELECT DISTINCT supplierName, COUNT(*) as cnt 
FROM services 
WHERE supplierName LIKE '%haus%' OR supplierName LIKE '%ecn%' OR supplierName LIKE '%channel%' OR supplierName LIKE '%bsip%'
GROUP BY supplierName;
